yang benar-benar kita ukur: M4 Balanced vs baseline distance-only NN, dari
PENTING: ini metrik LEVEL-PLAN (satu tur skenario jabodetabek_urban_sameday),
bukan agregat armada, dan berasal dari SATU skenario — desain M4 §7.3 minta tiga

summary.headline: M4 Balanced vs distance-only NN baseline — an honest trade-off, not a free win:

bullets.text: Tour SLA risk down 48.2% (0.245 → 0.127); late stops @P90 cut from 6/16 to 3/16
Cost up 8.6% (Rp 807k → Rp 876k) — the price paid for the risk reduction
CO₂ up 11.8% (25.1 → 28.1 kg): the route is more reliable, not shorter
Escalation rate 16.7% (2/12), inside the 5–20% healthy band

summary.footnote: Source: GET /internal/m4/routes (precomputed Pareto, ADR-004; OSRM road distances) — one scenario, 16-stop tour. M4 does not adapt to live traffic/weather; live per-shipment risk comes from the eta block of /decide.
